atoms.description: Related atom definitions grouped by domain

naming.async: camelCase with Atom suffix — async atoms use async get

patterns.name: Primitive atom
patterns.description: Writable atom with an initial value

patterns.name: Derived atom (read-only)
patterns.description: Computed atom derived from another atom

patterns.name: Async atom
patterns.pattern: export const userAtom = atom(async get => { const id = get(idAtom); return fetch('/users/' + id).then(r => r.json()); });

patterns.name: Write-only atom
patterns.pattern: export const resetAtom = atom(null, (_get, set) => set(countAtom, 0));
patterns.description: Action atom with no read value

injection_points.description: Wrap app with <Provider> for custom store isolation

patterns.name: useAtom
patterns.description: Read and write an atom — like useState but shared

patterns.name: useSetAtom
patterns.description: Write-only access — avoids subscribing to updates

patterns.name: atomWithStorage
patterns.description: Persists atom value to localStorage automatically

patterns.name: atomWithReset
patterns.description: Atom that can be reset to initial value via useResetAtom

questions.topic: how do I share state between components
questions.answer: Define an atom at module scope and use useAtom (or useAtomValue/useSetAtom) in any component — no Provider needed for the default store.

questions.topic: how do I derive state from other atoms
questions.answer: Create a derived atom using atom(get => ...) — it automatically re-computes when any read atom changes.
